aboveYou.name: Plum Heating & Cooling
aboveYou.note: 4,118 reviews — owns the map pack across north Melbourne

aboveYou.name: Gastek Heating & Cooling
aboveYou.note: Ranks for 5 related repair searches you don't appear on

findings.text: You are not in the top 3 map results for your own suburb
findings.detail: The three businesses in the map pack take the majority of calls for urgent heating searches. You sit below them, in 8th.

findings.text: Your homepage takes 6.4 seconds to load on a phone
findings.detail: Most emergency heating searches happen on mobile. Past 4 seconds, roughly half of visitors leave before it opens.

findings.text: 9 of your last 20 Google reviews have no reply
findings.detail: Unanswered reviews read as an unattended business — to Google's ranking and to the customer deciding between you and the next result.

findings.text: Your homepage title doesn't mention Reservoir or repairs
findings.detail: It reads like a brand name only. The title is the strongest signal Google has for matching you to a local repair search.

findings.text: Your website is secure and mobile-friendly
findings.detail: The foundations are fine. The problem is visibility, not the site itself.

stealPoint.quote: Booked a ducted heating service, waited all day, nobody showed and nobody called. Had to ring twice the next week just to rebook.
stealPoint.insight: The businesses ranked above you are winning on visibility, not service — their own reviews name slow callbacks as the weak spot. A visible same-day-callback promise, placed where customers compare you, turns their biggest complaint into your opening line.
